canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>territorial</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
body { 
  background: #0a0a0f; 
  overflow: hidden; 
  cursor: crosshair;
}
canvas { display: block; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="canvas"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

let width, height;
let seeds = [];
let targetSeeds = [];
let edges = [];
let time = 0;

const palette = {
  bg: '#0a0a0f',
  purple: '#9b4dca',
  pink: '#ff3d8b',
  cyan: '#00ffd5',
  white: '#ffffff'
};

function resize() {
  width = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  height = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
  if (seeds.length === 0) initSeeds();
}

class Seed {
  constructor(x, y, age = 0) {
    this.x = x;
    this.y = y;
    this.tx = x;
    this.ty = y;
    this.vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.3;
    this.vy = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.3;
    this.age = age;
    this.birthTime = time;
    this.hue = Math.random();
    this.pressure = 0;
  }
  
  update() {
    // Gentle drift
    this.x += this.vx;
    this.y += this.vy;
    
    // Soft boundary bounce
    if (this.x < 50 || this.x > width - 50) this.vx *= -0.8;
    if (this.y < 50 || this.y > height - 50) this.vy *= -0.8;
    
    // Clamp
    this.x = Math.max(20, Math.min(width - 20, this.x));
    this.y = Math.max(20, Math.min(height - 20, this.y));
    
    // Slight random perturbation
    this.vx += (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02;
    this.vy += (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02;
    
    // Damping
    this.vx *= 0.995;
    this.vy *= 0.995;
    
    this.age++;
  }
}

function initSeeds() {
  seeds = [];
  const count = Math.floor(Math.min(width, height) / 80);
  for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    seeds.push(new Seed(
      100 + Math.random() * (width - 200),
      100 + Math.random() * (height - 200)
    ));
  }
}

// Voronoi via Fortune's algorithm approximation (brute force for simplicity + real-time)
function computeVoronoi() {
  const resolution = 3;
  const gridW = Math.ceil(width / resolution);
  const gridH = Math.ceil(height / resolution);
  const ownership = new Int16Array(gridW * gridH);
  const distances = new Float32Array(gridW * gridH);
  
  // Assign each pixel to nearest seed
  for (let gy = 0; gy < gridH; gy++) {
    for (let gx = 0; gx < gridW; gx++) {
      const px = gx * resolution;
      const py = gy * resolution;
      let minDist = Infinity;
      let owner = 0;
      
      for (let i = 0; i < seeds.length; i++) {
        const dx = px - seeds[i].x;
        const dy = py - seeds[i].y;
        const dist = dx * dx + dy * dy;
        if (dist < minDist) {
          minDist = dist;
          owner = i;
        }
      }
      
      const idx = gy * gridW + gx;
      ownership[idx] = owner;
      distances[idx] = Math.sqrt(minDist);
    }
  }
  
  return { ownership, distances, gridW, gridH, resolution };
}

function getColor(seed, pressure, alpha = 1) {
  const age = Math.min(seed.age / 300, 1);
  const h = seed.hue;
  
  // Interpolate through palette based on hue and pressure
  let r, g, b;
  
  if (h < 0.33) {
    // Purple to pink
    const t = h / 0.33;
    r = Math.floor(155 + t * 100);
    g = Math.floor(77 - t * 16);
    b = Math.floor(202 - t * 63);
  } else if (h < 0.66) {
    // Pink to cyan
    const t = (h - 0.33) / 0.33;
    r = Math.floor(255 - t * 255);
    g = Math.floor(61 + t * 194);
    b = Math.floor(139 + t * 74);
  } else {
    // Cyan to purple
    const t = (h - 0.66) / 0.34;
    r = Math.floor(0 + t * 155);
    g = Math.floor(255 - t * 178);
    b = Math.floor(213 - t * 11);
  }
  
  // Pressure adds brightness
  const pressureBrightness = 1 + pressure * 0.5;
  r = Math.min(255, Math.floor(r * pressureBrightness));
  g = Math.min(255, Math.floor(g * pressureBrightness));
  b = Math.min(255, Math.floor(b * pressureBrightness));
  
  return `rgba(${r},${g},${b},${alpha})`;
}

function drawVoronoi(voronoi) {
  const { ownership, distances, gridW, gridH, resolution } = voronoi;
  const imageData = ctx.createImageData(width, height);
  const data = imageData.data;
  
  // Reset pressure
  seeds.forEach(s => s.pressure = 0);
  
  // Count cells and find edges
  const cellSizes = new Float32Array(seeds.length);
  
  for (let gy = 0; gy < gridH; gy++) {
    for (let gx = 0; gx < gridW; gx++) {
      const idx = gy * gridW + gx;
      const owner = ownership[idx];
      const dist = distances[idx];
      
      cellSizes[owner]++;
      
      // Check if edge (neighbor has different owner)
      let isEdge = false;
      let edgeIntensity = 0;
      
      if (gx > 0 && ownership[idx - 1] !== owner) { isEdge = true; edgeIntensity++; }
      if (gx < gridW - 1 && ownership[idx + 1] !== owner) { isEdge = true; edgeIntensity++; }
      if (gy > 0 && ownership[idx - gridW] !== owner) { isEdge = true; edgeIntensity++; }
      if (gy < gridH - 1 && ownership[idx + gridW] !== owner) { isEdge = true; edgeIntensity++; }
      
      const seed = seeds[owner];
      const px = gx * resolution;
      const py = gy * resolution;
      
      // Fill pixels
      for (let dy = 0; dy < resolution && py + dy < height; dy++) {
        for (let dx = 0; dx < resolution && px + dx < width; dx++) {
          const pixelIdx = ((py + dy) * width + (px + dx)) * 4;
          
          if (isEdge) {
            // Edge glow - cyan/pink based on tension
            const tension = edgeIntensity / 4;
            const pulse = Math.sin(time * 0.02 + seed.hue * Math.PI * 2) * 0.3 + 0.7;
            
            if (seed.hue < 0.5) {
              data[pixelIdx] = Math.floor(0 + tension * 100);
              data[pixelIdx + 1] = Math.floor(255 * pulse);
              data[pixelIdx + 2] = Math.floor(213 * pulse);
            } else {
              data[pixelIdx] = Math.floor(255 * pulse * tension);
              data[pixelIdx + 1] = Math.floor(61);
              data[pixelIdx + 2] = Math.floor(139 + tension * 50);
            }
            data[pixelIdx + 3] = Math.floor(200 + tension * 55);
            
            seeds[owner].pressure += 0.001;
          } else {
            // Interior gradient - darker toward edges, brighter at center
            const maxDist = Math.sqrt(width * width + height * height) / seeds.length;
            const normalizedDist = Math.min(dist / maxDist, 1);
            const brightness = Math.pow(1 - normalizedDist * 0.7, 1.5);
            
            const age = Math.min(seed.age / 500, 1);
            const h = seed.hue;
            
            let r, g, b;
            if (h < 0.33) {
              r = 155; g = 77; b = 202;
            } else if (h < 0.66) {
              r = 255; g = 61; b = 139;
            } else {
              r = 0; g = 200; b = 180;
            }
            
            const alpha = 0.15 + brightness * 0.25;
            data[pixelIdx] = Math.floor(r * brightness * 0.4);
            data[pixelIdx + 1] = Math.floor(g * brightness * 0.4);
            data[pixelIdx + 2] = Math.floor(b * brightness * 0.4);
            data[pixelIdx + 3] = Math.floor(alpha * 255);
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  ctx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);
  
  // Calculate pressure from cell size variance
  const avgSize = cellSizes.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / seeds.length;
  seeds.forEach((s, i) => {
    s.pressure += Math.abs(cellSizes[i] - avgSize) / avgSize * 0.5;
  });
}

function drawSeeds() {
  seeds.forEach((seed, i) => {
    const pulse = Math.sin(time * 0.03 + seed.hue * Math.PI * 4) * 0.3 + 0.7;
    const size = 3 + seed.pressure * 2 + pulse * 2;
    
    // Outer glow
    const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(seed.x, seed.y, 0, seed.x, seed.y, size * 4);
    gradient.addColorStop(0, getColor(seed, seed.pressure, 0.8));
    gradient.addColorStop(0.5, getColor(seed, seed.pressure, 0.2));
    gradient.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
    
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(seed.x, seed.y, size * 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
    ctx.fill();
    
    // Core
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(seed.x, seed.y, size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = getColor(seed, seed.pressure + 0.3, 1);
    ctx.fill();
  });
}

function drawConnections() {
  // Draw faint lines between close seeds
  ctx.lineWidth = 0.5;
  
  for (let i = 0; i < seeds.length; i++) {
    for (let j = i + 1; j < seeds.length; j++) {
      const dx = seeds[j].x - seeds[i].x;
      const dy = seeds[j].y - seeds[i].y;
      const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
      const maxDist = 200;
      
      if (dist < maxDist) {
        const alpha = (1 - dist / maxDist) * 0.15;
        const midHue = (seeds[i].hue + seeds[j].hue) / 2;
        
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(seeds[i].x, seeds[i].y);
        ctx.lineTo(seeds[j].x, seeds[j].y);
        ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(150, 100, 200, ${alpha})`;
        ctx.stroke();
      }
    }
  }
}

let mouseX = width / 2;
let mouseY = height / 2;
let mouseInfluence = 0;

canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
  mouseX = e.clientX;
  mouseY = e.clientY;
  mouseInfluence = 1;
  
  // Push nearby seeds away gently
  seeds.forEach(seed => {
    const dx = seed.x - mouseX;
    const dy = seed.y - mouseY;
    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
    
    if (dist < 150 && dist > 0) {
      const force = (150 - dist) / 150 * 0.5;
      seed.vx += (dx / dist) * force;
      seed.vy += (dy / dist) * force;
    }
  });
});

canvas.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
  // Add new seed at click position
  if (seeds.length < 30) {
    const newSeed = new Seed(e.clientX, e.clientY);
    newSeed.hue = Math.random();
    seeds.push(newSeed);
  } else {
    // Replace oldest seed
    let oldest = 0;
    let maxAge = 0;
    seeds.forEach((s, i) => {
      if (s.age > maxAge) {
        maxAge = s.age;
        oldest = i;
      }
    });
    seeds[oldest] = new Seed(e.clientX, e.clientY);
  }
});

// Touch support
canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
  e.preventDefault();
  const touch = e.touches[0];
  if (seeds.length < 30) {
    seeds.push(new Seed(touch.clientX, touch.clientY));
  }
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
  e.preventDefault();
  const touch = e.touches[0];
  mouseX = touch.clientX;
  mouseY = touch.clientY;
  
  seeds.forEach(seed => {
    const dx = seed.x - mouseX;
    const dy = seed.y - mouseY;
    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
    
    if (dist < 150 && dist > 0) {
      const force = (150 - dist) / 150 * 0.3;
      seed.vx += (dx / dist) * force;
      seed.vy += (dy / dist) * force;
    }
  });
});

function animate() {
  time++;
  
  // Fade background
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(10, 10, 15, 0.3)';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);
  
  // Update seeds
  seeds.forEach(seed => seed.update());
  
  // Compute and draw Voronoi
  const voronoi = computeVoronoi();
  drawVoronoi(voronoi);
  drawConnections();
  drawSeeds();
  
  // Mouse influence decay
  mouseInfluence *= 0.95;
  
  requestAnimationFrame(animate);
}

window.addEventListener('resize', resize);
resize();
animate();
</script>
</body>
</html>
